'''鈭歴h-t-sh-v''' ('''kashatshevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarter|quarter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-t-sh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarter|quarter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-t-sh-v
|-
! Lemma
| kashatshevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishatshevoko|thishatshevoko]] || [[word:jishatshevoko|jishatshevoko]] || [[word:shishatshevoko|shishatshevoko]] || [[word:kishatshevoko|kishatshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushatshevoko|thuthushatshevoko]] || [[word:jujushatshevoko|jujushatshevoko]] || [[word:shushushatshevoko|shushushatshevoko]] || [[word:kukushatshevoko|kukushatshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushatshevoko|thushatshevoko]] || [[word:jushatshevoko|jushatshevoko]] || [[word:shushatshevoko|shushatshevoko]] || [[word:kushatshevoko|kushatshevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushatshevoko|thushatshevoko]] || [[word:jushatshevoko|jushatshevoko]] || [[word:shushatshevoko|shushatshevoko]] || [[word:kushatshevoko|kushatshevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshatshevoko|theshatshevoko]] || [[word:jeshatshevoko|jeshatshevoko]] || [[word:sheshatshevoko|sheshatshevoko]] || [[word:keshatshevoko|keshatshevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshatshevoko|thothoshatshevoko]] || [[word:jojoshatshevoko|jojoshatshevoko]] || [[word:shoshoshatshevoko|shoshoshatshevoko]] || [[word:kokoshatshevoko|kokoshatshevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshatshevoko|thoshatshevoko]] || [[word:joshatshevoko|joshatshevoko]] || [[word:shoshatshevoko|shoshatshevoko]] || [[word:koshatshevoko|koshatshevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshatshevoko|thoshatshevoko]] || [[word:joshatshevoko|joshatshevoko]] || [[word:shoshatshevoko|shoshatshevoko]] || [[word:koshatshevoko|koshatshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shatshevoko|th忙shatshevoko]] || [[word:j忙shatshevoko|j忙shatshevoko]] || [[word:sh忙shatshevoko|sh忙shatshevoko]] || [[word:k忙shatshevoko|k忙shatshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashatshevoko|thathashatshevoko]] || [[word:jajashatshevoko|jajashatshevoko]] || [[word:shashashatshevoko|shashashatshevoko]] || [[word:kakashatshevoko|kakashatshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashatshevoko|thashatshevoko]] || [[word:jashatshevoko|jashatshevoko]] || [[word:shashatshevoko|shashatshevoko]] || [[word:kashatshevoko|kashatshevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashatshevoko|thashatshevoko]] || [[word:jashatshevoko|jashatshevoko]] || [[word:shashatshevoko|shashatshevoko]] || [[word:kashatshevoko|kashatshevoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
